name: tvt-sales-agent
description: Dynamic dispatcher over Tavant's fintech sales/intel/pm/create skill family. One entry point (tvt-sales-agent) instead of ~22 named skills -- ask in plain language, it figures out which skill(s) handle it. An Agent Factory fills genuine capability gaps with a temporary agent, gated behind a spike-tested, human-approved promotion path before anything becomes permanent. Fully self-contained: every dependency is vendored in (see VENDORED_FROM.md), zero cross-repo references.
